title: PJM Load Forecast Hourly Historical CSV download
description:
This feed provides forecasted load, grouped by the date and time the forecast
was created. Forecasts are provided every six hours starting one day prior to the
Effective Date.

- Includes all published vintages
- Includes data for all forecast areas
- For additional forecast areas and publish times for recent dates, use
    `load_forecast_hourly`
- Data available at https://dataminer2.pjm.com/feed/load_frcstd_hist/definition
